text.title: US / UK / EU Compliance Matrix Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the US / UK / EU Compliance Matrix methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Every customer record MUST be tagged with the applicable jurisdiction (US-CA, US-other, UK, EEA-country, other). Tag determines which set of obligations apply.
rule.rationale: Aggregating customers as 'global' obscures which obligations attach; per-customer tagging makes the matrix actionable.

rule.statement: For each personal-data processing activity, lawful basis MUST be one of: consent, contract, legitimate interest, legal obligation, vital interests, public task. Lawful basis recorded in the matrix per activity.
rule.rationale: Lawful basis is the GDPR/UK-GDPR entry point; absent basis = unlawful processing.

rule.statement: Contract template MUST match buyer type: B2B enterprise (DPA + SCCs / IDTA), B2B small (DPA), B2C (consumer terms + CCPA notice). Cross-border transfers always require SCCs/IDTA + TIA.
rule.rationale: Wrong template = unenforceable or non-compliant; the matrix pins the right template per situation.

rule.statement: Tax thresholds per jurisdiction MUST be tracked: CA $500k (CCPA), VAT-OSS €10k (EU), UK VAT £85k. Threshold crossing triggers a registration + collection workflow.

rationale.source: CDTFA CA Sales Tax; VAT One-Stop-Shop scheme

rule.rationale: Threshold-missed = late registration + penalty; tracking lets the founder act before crossing.

rule.statement: Every product feature touching EU users MUST be tagged with EU AI Act risk: unacceptable / high / limited / minimal. High-risk features require conformity assessment + registration.
rule.rationale: AI Act in force 2024-2026; high-risk obligations are heavy + non-optional.

rule.statement: Matrix MUST be reviewed quarterly with counsel sign-off. Statute changes (e.g. new state privacy law, DSA enforcement) added to the matrix within 30 days of effective date.
rule.rationale: Privacy + tax law churns; quarterly review keeps the matrix current.
